form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming held ground to the line finished second of 7 starters at Plumpton on February 23 over 4100m, on slow going 9 len behind Eliza Dolittle with 71.5kg at $5. Last start won by 9 len Hereford on April 6 over 3900m defeating Innisfree Pearl with 72.5kg at $3.50 in a hurdle. Fitter now and making headway every start. Major player again.
